content:
📊 每日AI科研速递 — 2026年05月13日
今日热点: Agent工具 + 新项目速递

🔥 [LLM/Agent] 最新开源项目

1 [sno-ai/llmix](https://github.com/sno-ai/llmix)
Production LLM call layer for AI agents and tools: keep OpenAI/Anthrop
标签: ai-agents,ai-sdk | ⭐30

2 [LYiHub/OpenClaw-AWD-Arena](https://github.com/LYiHub/OpenClaw-AWD-Arena)
An automated Attack-with-Defense platform where LLM-powered agents com
标签: AI | ⭐165

3 [cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent-skills](https://github.com/cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent-skills)
A curated registry of reusable Mercury Agent, Open Claw or Hermes Agen
标签: ai,ai-agents | ⭐102

4 [ChristianJR19/Goblin-Agent](https://github.com/ChristianJR19/Goblin-Agent)
No description
标签: AI | ⭐344

5 [zhengkid/AutoTTS](https://github.com/zhengkid/AutoTTS)
The offical repo for "LLMs Improving LLMs: Agentic Discovery for Test-
标签: AI | ⭐63

6 [EricXu20266/llm-proxy](https://github.com/EricXu20266/llm-proxy)
Codex + Claude → DeepSeek or other llm 本地代理 | Agent Protocol Translati
标签: AI | ⭐26

7 [secureagentics/Adrian](https://github.com/secureagentics/Adrian)
Open-source runtime security monitoring and control for AI agents.
标签: AI | ⭐35

8 [huangserva/3DCellForge](https://github.com/huangserva/3DCellForge)
AI-powered interactive 3D cell generation and exploration studio.
标签: AI | ⭐1711

9 [Pieverse-Eng/purrfect-agent](https://github.com/Pieverse-Eng/purrfect-agent)
No description
标签: AI | ⭐44

10 [jhingran/llm](https://github.com/jhingran/llm)

标签: AI | ⭐5

📈 趋势总结
• 新项目持续涌现
• AI agent 相关项目增长最快
• 多模态 agent 成为热点
